purpose: Provides overpressure protection by opening when system pressure exceeds safe limits and sealing when pressure returns to normal operating range

inputs.name: system_pressure
inputs.description: Current system pressure that the safety valve monitors

inputs.name: operating_cycles
inputs.description: Number of valve operating cycles for degradation tracking

outputs.name: leakage_rate
outputs.description: Mass flow rate of fluid leaking through valve when closed

states.name: safety_valve_sealing_condition
states.description: Safety valve sealing degradation due to normal operation

states.name: valve_obstruction
states.description: Safety valve operation degradation due to dirt or paint obstruction

states.name: pressure_tracking
states.description: Tracked system pressure for event threshold evaluation

events.name: safety_valve_blows_unloading_failure
events.description: Compressor does not unload, safety valve blows

parameters.name: pressure_tracking_coefficient
parameters.description: First-order lag coefficient for pressure tracking

parameters.name: leakage_threshold
parameters.description: Sealing condition threshold for leakage detection

parameters.name: obstruction_threshold
parameters.description: Obstruction level threshold for operation failure

parameters.name: high_pressure_threshold
parameters.description: Pressure threshold for unloading failure detection

parameters.name: max_leakage_rate
parameters.description: Maximum leakage rate when sealing is completely degraded

state_transition_logic: safety_valve_sealing_condition decreases by (1/sealing_degradation_timescale) * operating_cycles * dt, clamped to [0.0, 1.0]
valve_obstruction increases by obstruction_accumulation_rate * dt, clamped to [0.0, 1.0]
pressure_tracking approaches system_pressure using first-order lag with pressure_tracking_coefficient, clamped to [0.0, 2000000.0]
output_logic: valve_position = 1.0 if pressure_tracking > set_pressure and valve_obstruction < obstruction_threshold, else 0.0
leakage_rate = max_leakage_rate * (1.0 - safety_valve_sealing_condition) when valve_position = 0.0, else 0.0
event_logic: safety_valve_blows_after_loading occurs when pressure_tracking > set_pressure and valve_obstruction > obstruction_threshold
safety_valve_out_of_order occurs when valve_obstruction > obstruction_threshold or safety_valve_sealing_condition < 0.3
assumptions: Safety valve operates as a simple pressure relief device with binary open/closed states
Sealing degradation is primarily driven by operating cycles rather than time
Obstruction accumulates gradually over time due to environmental contamination
Valve opening is instantaneous when pressure exceeds set point and obstruction is minimal
Leakage rate is proportional to sealing condition degradation when valve is closed
